name: Curried Pork with Sweet Potatos
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the sweet potatoes and cut them into 1/2 inch slices.
2. Cut the pork into 1/2 inch cubes.
3. Slice the onion thinly.
4. Mince the ginger root.
5. Heat oil in a large skillet or wok, then fry the sweet potato slices until golden brown. Drain on paper towels.
6. Add remaining oil to the pan. Stir-fry the ginger and onion for a few minutes.
7. Add the pork and cook until it is lightly browned on all sides.
8. Stir in soy sauce, salt, and black pepper.
9. Pour in the chicken stock and curry powder. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
10. Add the fried sweet potatoes and simmer, covered, for about 30-40 minutes, or until the pork is cooked through.
This classic recipe has been seen from many sources and is often enjoyed by those who appreciate a hot and spicy dish.
